query:
ALTER TABLE police_reports 
ADD COLUMN vehicle1_mass INT,
ADD COLUMN vehicle2_mass INT,
ADD COLUMN skid_mark_length DECIMAL(10,2),
ADD COLUMN impact_speed INT,
ADD COLUMN road_gradient DECIMAL(5,2),
ADD COLUMN lighting_condition VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN traffic_condition VARCHAR(100),
ADD COLUMN ocr_extracted TINYINT DEFAULT 0,
ADD COLUMN ocr_confidence INT,
ADD COLUMN ocr_notes TEXT;
